headline: Downvotes cost 1.6× more than upvotes, and three Physics chapters are driving 40% of the multi-turn retry burst.
subhead: Rotational Motion (Class 11) appears on both lists. Likely a first-answer failure, not a content gap.

insights.claim: Rotational Motion retries are spiking. 18% of students fire 3+ queries in 60s, up from 7%.
insights.evidence: Same chapter is #2 downvote source today.
insights.context: Pattern matches a first-answer failure, not a content gap.

insights.claim: gpt-5.2 student TTFT degraded. p90 9.0s ▲ +1.1s, student-only.
insights.context: Isolated to the streaming gateway, not model inference.

insights.evidence: Language-mismatch tag appears 4× today, 0× last week.

insights.claim: Class 11 Physics traffic up 14%. Exam-week pattern, not a regression.
insights.evidence: Concentrated 19:00 to 22:00 IST; matches Mar 2026 cohort.
